name: Data issue

labels: data

## Which data file?
<!-- e.g. data/sequences/proteins_25k_sequences.json, data/annotations/proteins_25k_pfam.json, data/embeddings/embeddings_t30.npy -->

## What is your concern?
<!-- Label question, provenance question, Pfam coverage question, sequence integrity question, etc. -->

## Specific accessions (if applicable)
<!-- UniProt IDs you are asking about -->

## Provenance check performed
<!-- Did you verify against the SHA256 in MANIFEST.sha256.json? Did you re-fetch from UniProt? -->

- [ ] SHA256 matches MANIFEST
- [ ] Re-fetched from UniProt and compared
- [ ] Neither
